en.name: Acid Arrow
en.description: A shimmering green arrow streaks toward a target within range and bursts in a spray of acid. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 4d4 acid damage immediately and 2d4 acid damage at the end of its next turn. On a miss, the arrow splashes the target with acid for half of the initial damage and no damage at the end of its next turn.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the initial and later damage each increase by 1d4 for each slot level above 2nd.

en.components: V, S, M (powdered rhubarb leaf and an adder's stomach)

pt.name: Flecha Ácida
pt.description: Uma flecha verde cintilante dispara contra um alvo ao alcance e explode em um jato de ácido. Faça um ataque mágico à distância contra o alvo. Com um acerto, o alvo sofre 4d4 de dano de ácido imediatamente e 2d4 de dano de ácido no fim do próximo turno dele. Se errar, a flecha espirra ácido no alvo e causa metade do dano inicial, sem dano adicional no fim do turno.

higherLevels.level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3º nível ou superior, o dano inicial e o dano posterior aumentam em 1d4 para cada nível de espaço acima do 2º.

pt.components: V, S, M (folha de ruibarbo em pó e estômago de víbora)

en.name: Acid Splash
en.description: You hurl a bubble of acid. Choose one creature within range, or choose two creatures within range that are within 5 feet of each other. A target must succeed on a Dexterity saving throw or take 1d6 acid damage.

higherLevels.level: This spell's damage increases by 1d6 when you reach 5th level (2d6), 11th level (3d6), and 17th level (4d6).

en.components: V, S

pt.name: Respingo Ácido
pt.description: Você arremessa uma bolha de ácido. Escolha uma criatura ao alcance, ou duas criaturas ao alcance que estejam a até 1,5 metro uma da outra. Um alvo deve ser bem-sucedido em um teste de resistência de Destreza ou sofre 1d6 de dano de ácido.

higherLevels.level: O dano desta magia aumenta em 1d6 quando você alcança o 5º nível (2d6), 11º nível (3d6) e 17º nível (4d6).

pt.components: V, S

en.name: Aid
en.description: Your spell bolsters your allies with toughness and resolve. Choose up to three creatures within range. Each target's hit point maximum and current hit points increase by 5 for the duration.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, a target's hit points increase by an additional 5 for each slot level above 2nd.

en.components: V, S, M (a tiny strip of white cloth)

pt.name: Auxílio
pt.description: Sua magia fortalece seus aliados com vigor e determinação. Escolha até três criaturas ao alcance. O máximo de pontos de vida e os pontos de vida atuais de cada alvo aumentam em 5 pela duração.

higherLevels.level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3º nível ou superior, os pontos de vida de cada alvo aumentam em 5 adicionais para cada nível de espaço acima do 2º.

pt.components: V, S, M (uma pequena tira de pano branco)

en.name: Alarm
en.description: You set an alarm against unwanted intrusion. Choose a door, a window, or an area within range no larger than a 20-foot cube. Until the spell ends, an alarm alerts you whenever a Tiny or larger creature touches or enters the warded area. When you cast the spell, you can designate creatures that won't set off the alarm. You also choose whether the alarm is mental or audible. A mental alarm alerts you with a ping in your mind if you are within 1 mile of the warded area and wakes you if you are sleeping. An audible alarm produces the sound of a hand bell for 10 seconds within 60 feet.
en.components: V, S, M (a tiny bell and a piece of fine silver wire)

pt.name: Alarme
pt.description: Você define um alarme contra intrusões indesejadas. Escolha uma porta, uma janela ou uma área ao alcance de até um cubo de 6 metros de lado. Até a magia terminar, um alarme avisa você sempre que uma criatura Pequena ou maior tocar ou entrar na área protegida. Ao conjurar a magia, você pode designar criaturas que não disparam o alarme. Você também escolhe se o alarme é mental ou audível. Um alarme mental envia um sinal à sua mente se você estiver a até 1,6 quilômetro da área protegida e desperta você se estiver dormindo. Um alarme audível produz o som de um sino de mão por 10 segundos num raio de 18 metros.
pt.components: V, S, M (um pequeno sino e um pedaço de fio de prata fino)

en.name: Alter Self
en.description: You assume a different form. When you cast the spell, choose one of the following options for the duration. Aquatic Adaptation: you sprout gills and webbing, can breathe underwater, and gain a swimming speed equal to your walking speed. Change Appearance: you transform your appearance, including height, weight, facial features, voice, hair, coloration, and distinguishing traits, but not your statistics or size category; you can use your action to change appearance again while the spell lasts. Natural Weapons: you grow claws, fangs, spines, horns, or another natural weapon. Your unarmed strikes deal 1d6 bludgeoning, piercing, or slashing damage, you are proficient with them, and they are magical with a +1 bonus to attack and damage rolls.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Alterar-se
pt.description: Você assume uma forma diferente. Ao conjurar a magia, escolha uma das opções a seguir para a duração. Adaptação Aquática: você desenvolve guelras e membranas, pode respirar debaixo d'água e ganha deslocamento de natação igual ao seu deslocamento de caminhada. Mudar Aparência: você altera sua aparência, incluindo altura, peso, traços faciais, voz, cabelo, coloração e marcas distintas, mas não suas estatísticas nem sua categoria de tamanho; enquanto a magia durar, você pode usar sua ação para mudar de aparência novamente. Armas Naturais: você cria garras, presas, espinhos, chifres ou outra arma natural. Seus ataques desarmados causam 1d6 de dano contundente, perfurante ou cortante, você é proficiente com eles, e eles se tornam mágicos com +1 nas jogadas de ataque e dano.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Animal Friendship
en.description: This spell lets you convince a beast that you mean it no harm. Choose a beast that you can see within range. It must see and hear you. If the beast's Intelligence is 4 or higher, the spell fails. Otherwise, the beast must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or be charmed by you for the spell's duration. If you or one of your companions harms the target, the spell ends.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you can affect one additional beast for each slot level above 1st.

en.components: V, S, M (a morsel of food)

pt.name: Amizade Animal
pt.description: Esta magia permite convencer uma besta de que você não pretende machucá-la. Escolha uma besta que você possa ver ao alcance. Ela deve ver e ouvir você. Se a Inteligência da besta for 4 ou maior, a magia falha. Caso contrário, a besta deve ser bem-sucedida em um teste de resistência de Sabedoria ou ficará enfeitiçada por você pela duração da magia. Se você ou um de seus companheiros ferir o alvo, a magia termina.

higherLevels.level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 2º nível ou superior, pode afetar uma besta adicional para cada nível de espaço acima do 1º.

pt.components: V, S, M (um pedaço de comida)

en.name: Animal Messenger
en.description: By means of this spell, you use an animal to deliver a message. Choose a Tiny beast you can see within range, such as a squirrel, a blue jay, or a bat. Specify a location you have visited and a recipient matching a general description. You also speak a message of up to twenty-five words. The beast travels toward the destination for the duration, covering about 50 miles per 24 hours if it can fly, or 25 miles otherwise. When it arrives, it delivers your message in your voice only to a creature matching your description. If it doesn't arrive before the spell ends, the message is lost and the beast returns to where you cast the spell.

higherLevels.level: If you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the duration increases by 48 hours for each slot level above 2nd.

en.components: V, S, M (a morsel of food)

pt.name: Mensageiro Animal
pt.description: Por meio desta magia, você usa um animal para entregar uma mensagem. Escolha uma besta Minúscula que você possa ver ao alcance, como um esquilo, um gaio-azul ou um morcego. Especifique um local que você já visitou e um destinatário que corresponda a uma descrição geral. Você também fala uma mensagem de até vinte e cinco palavras. A besta viaja em direção ao destino pela duração da magia, cobrindo cerca de 80 quilômetros por 24 horas se puder voar, ou 40 quilômetros caso contrário. Quando chega, ela entrega sua mensagem com sua voz apenas a uma criatura que corresponda à descrição dada. Se não chegar antes da magia terminar, a mensagem é perdida e a besta retorna ao local onde a magia foi conjurada.

higherLevels.level: Se você conjurar esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 3º nível ou superior, a duração aumenta em 48 horas para cada nível de espaço acima do 2º.

pt.components: V, S, M (um pedaço de comida)

en.name: Animal Shapes
en.description: Your magic turns others into beasts. Choose any number of willing creatures that you can see within range. You transform each target into the form of a Large or smaller beast with challenge rating 4 or lower. On subsequent turns, you can use your action to transform affected creatures into new forms. The transformation lasts for each target until the spell ends or the target drops to 0 hit points or dies. A target's statistics are replaced by the chosen beast's statistics, but it retains its alignment and Intelligence, Wisdom, and Charisma scores. The target assumes the hit points of the new form, returns to its previous hit points when it reverts, and any excess damage carries over. The creature is limited by the new form and can't speak or cast spells. Its gear melds into the new form.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Formas Animais
pt.description: Sua magia transforma outros em bestas. Escolha qualquer número de criaturas voluntárias que você possa ver ao alcance. Você transforma cada alvo na forma de uma besta Grande ou menor com nível de desafio 4 ou menos. Em turnos posteriores, você pode usar sua ação para transformar criaturas afetadas em novas formas. A transformação dura para cada alvo até a magia terminar ou até o alvo cair a 0 pontos de vida ou morrer. As estatísticas do alvo são substituídas pelas da besta escolhida, mas ele mantém seu alinhamento e seus valores de Inteligência, Sabedoria e Carisma. O alvo assume os pontos de vida da nova forma, volta aos pontos de vida anteriores quando retorna à forma normal, e qualquer dano excedente é transferido. A criatura fica limitada pela nova forma e não pode falar nem conjurar magias. O equipamento do alvo se funde à nova forma.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Animate Dead
en.description: This spell creates an undead servant. Choose a pile of bones or a corpse of a Medium or Small humanoid within range. The target becomes a skeleton if you chose bones or a zombie if you chose a corpse. On each of your turns, you can use a bonus action to mentally command any creature you made with this spell if it is within 60 feet of you. You decide its action and movement for its next turn, or you can give a general command. If you give no command, it only defends itself. Once given an order, it continues until the task is complete. The creature remains under your control for 24 hours. To maintain control for another 24 hours, you must cast the spell on the creature again before the period ends; this reasserts control over up to four creatures you animated with this spell instead of creating a new one.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, you animate or reassert control over two additional undead creatures for each slot level above 3rd. Each creature must come from a different corpse or pile of bones.

en.components: V, S, M (a drop of blood, a piece of flesh, and a pinch of bone dust)

pt.name: Animar Mortos
pt.description: Esta magia cria um servo morto-vivo. Escolha um monte de ossos ou o cadáver de um humanoide Médio ou Pequeno ao alcance. O alvo se torna um esqueleto se você escolher ossos ou um zumbi se escolher um cadáver. Em cada um dos seus turnos, você pode usar uma ação bônus para comandar mentalmente qualquer criatura criada por esta magia se ela estiver a até 18 metros de você. Você decide a ação e o movimento dela no próximo turno, ou pode dar uma ordem geral. Se você não der comandos, ela apenas se defende. Depois de receber uma ordem, a criatura continua a segui-la até concluir a tarefa. A criatura permanece sob seu controle por 24 horas. Para manter o controle por mais 24 horas, você deve conjurar a magia novamente nela antes do fim desse período; isso reafirma o controle sobre até quatro criaturas animadas por esta magia em vez de criar uma nova.

higherLevels.level: Quando você conjura esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 4º nível ou superior, você anima ou reafirma o controle sobre duas criaturas mortas-vivas adicionais para cada nível de espaço acima do 3º. Cada criatura deve vir de um cadáver ou monte de ossos diferente.

pt.components: V, S, M (uma gota de sangue, um pedaço de carne e uma pitada de pó de osso)

en.name: Animate Objects
en.description: Objects come to life at your command. Choose up to ten nonmagical objects within range that are not being worn or carried. Medium targets count as two objects, Large as four, and Huge as eight. Each target animates and becomes a creature under your control until the spell ends or until reduced to 0 hit points. As a bonus action, you can mentally command any creature you made with this spell if it is within 500 feet of you. If you give no command, it only defends itself. An animated object is a construct whose AC, hit points, attack bonus, damage, Strength, and Dexterity depend on its size; it has Constitution 10, Intelligence 3, Wisdom 3, Charisma 1, speed 30 feet, or fly 30 feet if it lacks limbs, and blindsight 30 feet. When reduced to 0 hit points, it returns to its original object form. If commanded to attack, it makes one melee slam attack using the statistics for its size.

higherLevels.level: If you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, you can animate two additional objects for each slot level above 5th.

en.components: V, S

pt.name: Animar Objetos
pt.description: Objetos ganham vida sob seu comando. Escolha até dez objetos não mágicos ao alcance que não estejam sendo vestidos nem carregados. Alvos Médios contam como dois objetos, Grandes como quatro e Enormes como oito. Cada alvo animado se torna uma criatura sob seu controle até a magia terminar ou cair a 0 pontos de vida. Como ação bônus, você pode comandar mentalmente qualquer criatura criada por esta magia se ela estiver a até 150 metros de você. Se não houver comando, ela apenas se defende. Um objeto animado é um construto cuja CA, pontos de vida, bônus de ataque, dano, Força e Destreza dependem do tamanho; ele tem Constituição 10, Inteligência 3, Sabedoria 3, Carisma 1, deslocamento 9 metros, ou voo 9 metros se não tiver membros, e percepção às cegas de 9 metros. Quando cai a 0 pontos de vida, retorna à forma original. Se receber ordem para atacar, faz um único ataque corpo a corpo de pancada usando as estatísticas do seu tamanho.

higherLevels.level: Se você conjurar esta magia usando um espaço de magia de 6º nível ou superior, pode animar dois objetos adicionais para cada nível de espaço acima do 5º.

pt.components: V, S

en.name: Antilife Shell
en.description: A shimmering barrier extends out from you in a 10-foot radius and moves with you, remaining centered on you and hedging out creatures other than undead and constructs. The barrier lasts for the duration. It prevents an affected creature from passing or reaching through it. An affected creature can cast spells or make attacks with ranged or reach weapons through the barrier. If you move so that an affected creature is forced to pass through the barrier, the spell ends.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Concha Antivida
pt.description: Uma barreira cintilante se estende a partir de você num raio de 3 metros e se move com você, permanecendo centrada em você e afastando criaturas que não sejam mortos-vivos nem construtos. A barreira dura pela duração da magia. Ela impede que uma criatura afetada atravesse ou alcance através dela. Uma criatura afetada ainda pode conjurar magias ou fazer ataques com armas à distância ou de alcance através da barreira. Se você se mover de modo que uma criatura afetada seja forçada a passar pela barreira, a magia termina.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Antimagic Field
en.description: A 10-foot-radius invisible sphere of antimagic surrounds you and moves with you, centered on you. Within the sphere, spells can't be cast, summoned creatures disappear, and magic items become mundane. Spells and magical effects are suppressed in the sphere and can't extend into it, except effects created by an artifact or a deity. Targeted magical effects have no effect on targets inside the sphere. Areas of magic are suppressed where they overlap the sphere. Active spells and magic on creatures or objects inside the sphere are suppressed while they remain there. Teleportation and planar travel fail in the sphere. Portals and extradimensional openings temporarily close while inside it. Creatures or objects summoned or created by magic temporarily wink out inside the sphere and reappear when no longer within it. Dispel magic and similar effects do not affect the sphere, and overlapping antimagic fields do not cancel each other.
en.components: V, S, M (a pinch of powdered iron or iron filings)

pt.name: Campo Antimagia
pt.description: Uma esfera invisível antimagia com raio de 3 metros envolve você e se move com você, permanecendo centrada em você. Dentro da esfera, magias não podem ser conjuradas, criaturas invocadas desaparecem e itens mágicos se tornam mundanos. Magias e efeitos mágicos ficam suprimidos na esfera e não podem se estender para dentro dela, exceto efeitos criados por um artefato ou por uma divindade. Efeitos mágicos direcionados não afetam alvos dentro da esfera. Áreas mágicas são suprimidas na parte sobreposta pela esfera. Magias ativas e magia em criaturas ou objetos dentro da esfera ficam suprimidas enquanto permanecerem ali. Teleporte e viagem planar falham na esfera. Portais e aberturas extradimensionais se fecham temporariamente ao entrar nela. Criaturas ou objetos invocados ou criados por magia desaparecem temporariamente dentro da esfera e reaparecem quando deixam de estar nela. Dissipar magia e efeitos semelhantes não afetam a esfera, e campos antimagia sobrepostos não anulam uns aos outros.
pt.components: V, S, M (uma pitada de ferro em pó ou limalha de ferro)

en.name: Antipathy/Sympathy
en.description: s This spell attracts or repels creatures of your choice. You target something within range, either a Huge or smaller object or creature or an area that is no larger than a 200---foot cube. Then specify a kind of intelligent creature, such a s red dragons, goblins, or vampires. You invest the target with an aura that either attracts or repels the specified creatures for the duration. Choose antipathy or sympathy as the aura's effect. Antipathy. The enchantment causes creatures of the kind you designated to feel an intense urge to leave the area and avoid the target. When such a creature can see the target or comes within 60 feet of it, the creature must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become frightened. The creature remains frightened while it can see the target or is within 60 feet of it. While frightened by the target, the creature must use its movement to move to the nearest safe spot from which it can't see the target. If the creature moves more than 60 feet from the target and can't see it, the creature is no longer frightened, but the creature becomes frightened again if it regains sight of the target or moves within 60 feet of it. Sympathy. The enchantment causes the specified creatures to feel an intense urge to approach the target while within 60 feet of it or able to see it. When such a creature can see the target or comes within 60 feet of it, the creature must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or use its movement on each of its turns to enter the area or move within reach of the target. When the creature has done so, it can't willingly move away from the target. If the target damages or otherwise harms an affected creature, the affected creature can make a Wisdom saving throw to end the effect, as described below. Ending the Effect. If an affected creature ends its turn while not within 60 feet of the target or able to see it, the creature makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the creature is no longer affected by the target and recognizes the feeling of repugnance or attraction as magical. In addition, a creature affected by the spell is allowed another Wisdom saving throw every 24 hours while the spell persists. A creature that successfully saves against this effect is immune to it for 1 minute, after which time it can be affected again.
en.components: V, S, M (either a lump of alum soaked in vinegar for the antipathy effect or a drop of honey for the sympathy effect)

pt.name: Antipathy/Sympathy
pt.description: s This spell attracts or repels creatures of your choice. You target something within range, either a Huge or smaller object or creature or an area that is no larger than a 200---foot cube. Then specify a kind of intelligent creature, such a s red dragons, goblins, or vampires. You invest the target with an aura that either attracts or repels the specified creatures for the duration. Choose antipathy or sympathy as the aura's effect. Antipathy. The enchantment causes creatures of the kind you designated to feel an intense urge to leave the area and avoid the target. When such a creature can see the target or comes within 60 feet of it, the creature must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or become frightened. The creature remains frightened while it can see the target or is within 60 feet of it. While frightened by the target, the creature must use its movement to move to the nearest safe spot from which it can't see the target. If the creature moves more than 60 feet from the target and can't see it, the creature is no longer frightened, but the creature becomes frightened again if it regains sight of the target or moves within 60 feet of it. Sympathy. The enchantment causes the specified creatures to feel an intense urge to approach the target while within 60 feet of it or able to see it. When such a creature can see the target or comes within 60 feet of it, the creature must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or use its movement on each of its turns to enter the area or move within reach of the target. When the creature has done so, it can't willingly move away from the target. If the target damages or otherwise harms an affected creature, the affected creature can make a Wisdom saving throw to end the effect, as described below. Ending the Effect. If an affected creature ends its turn while not within 60 feet of the target or able to see it, the creature makes a Wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the creature is no longer affected by the target and recognizes the feeling of repugnance or attraction as magical. In addition, a creature affected by the spell is allowed another Wisdom saving throw every 24 hours while the spell persists. A creature that successfully saves against this effect is immune to it for 1 minute, after which time it can be affected again.
pt.components: V, S, M (either a lump of alum soaked in vinegar for the antipathy effect or a drop of honey for the sympathy effect)

en.name: Arcane Eye
en.description: You create an invisible magical eye within range that lasts for the duration. You mentally receive visual information from the eye, which can move up to 30 feet per turn.
en.components: V, S, M (a bit of bat fur)

pt.name: Olho Arcano
pt.description: Você cria um olho mágico invisível dentro do alcance que dura pela duração. Você recebe informações visuais mentalmente do olho, que pode se mover até 9 metros por turno.
pt.components: V, S, M (um pouco de pelo de morcego)

en.name: Arcane Hand
en.description: You create a Large hand of shimmering force that appears in an unoccupied space. The hand lasts for the duration and can manipulate objects and creatures.
en.components: V, S, M (an eggshell and a snakeskin glove)

pt.name: Mão Arcana
pt.description: Você cria uma mão grande de força cintilante que aparece em um espaço desocupado. A mão dura pela duração e pode manipular objetos e criaturas.
pt.components: V, S, M (uma casca de ovo e uma luva de pele de cobra)

en.name: Arcane Lock
en.description: You touch a closed door, window, gate, chest, or other entry, and it becomes locked for the duration.
en.components: V, S, M (gold dust worth at least 25 gp)

pt.name: Tranca Arcana
pt.description: Você toca uma porta, janela, portão ou baú fechado e ele se torna trancado pela duração.
pt.components: V, S, M (pó de ouro no valor de 25 po)

en.name: Arcane Sword
en.description: You create a sword-shaped plane of force that hovers within range and strikes targets.
en.components: V, S, M (a miniature platinum sword)

pt.name: Espada Arcana
pt.description: Você cria uma espada de força que flutua dentro do alcance e ataca alvos.
pt.components: V, S, M (uma espada de platina em miniatura)

en.name: Arcanist's Magic Aura
en.description: s You place an illusion on a creature or an object you touch so that divination spells reveal false information about it. The target can be a willing creature or an object that isn't being carried or worn by another creature. When you cast the spell, choose one or both of the following effects. The effect lasts for the duration. If you cast this spell on the same creature or object every day for 30 days, placing the same effect on it each time, the illusion lasts until it is dispelled. False Aura. You change the way the target appears to spells and magical effects, such as detect magic, that detect magical auras . You can make a nonmagical object appear magical, a magical object appear nonmagical, or change the object's magical aura so that it appears to belong to a specific school of magic that you choose. When you use this effect on an object, you can make the false magic apparent to any creature that handles the item. Mask. You change the way the target appears to spells and magical effe cts that detect creature types, such as a paladin's Divine Sense or the trigger of a symbol spell. You choose a creature type and other spells and magical effects treat the target as if it were a creature of that type or of that alignment.
en.components: V, S, M (a small square of silk)

pt.name: Arcanist's Magic Aura
pt.description: s You place an illusion on a creature or an object you touch so that divination spells reveal false information about it. The target can be a willing creature or an object that isn't being carried or worn by another creature. When you cast the spell, choose one or both of the following effects. The effect lasts for the duration. If you cast this spell on the same creature or object every day for 30 days, placing the same effect on it each time, the illusion lasts until it is dispelled. False Aura. You change the way the target appears to spells and magical effects, such as detect magic, that detect magical auras . You can make a nonmagical object appear magical, a magical object appear nonmagical, or change the object's magical aura so that it appears to belong to a specific school of magic that you choose. When you use this effect on an object, you can make the false magic apparent to any creature that handles the item. Mask. You change the way the target appears to spells and magical effe cts that detect creature types, such as a paladin's Divine Sense or the trigger of a symbol spell. You choose a creature type and other spells and magical effects treat the target as if it were a creature of that type or of that alignment.
pt.components: V, S, M (a small square of silk)

en.name: Astral Projection
en.description: You and up to eight willing creatur es within range project your astral bodies into the Astral Plane (the spell fails and the casting is wasted if you are already on that plane). The material body you leave behind is unconscious and in a state of suspended animation; it doesn't need food or air and doesn't age. Your astral body resembles your mortal form in almost every way, replicating your game statistics and possessions. The principal difference is the addition of a silvery cord that extends from between your shoulder blades and trails be hind you, fading to invisibility after 1 foot. This cord is your tether to your material body. As long as the tether remains intact, you can find your way home. If the cord is cut-something that can happen only when an effect specifically states that it do es-your soul and body are separated, killing you instantly. Your astral form can freely travel through the Astral Plane and can pass through portals there leading to any other plane. If you enter a new plane or return to the plane you were on when casting this spell, your body and possessions are transported along the silver cord, allowing you to re---enter your body as you enter the new plane. Your astral form is a separate incarnation. Any damage or other effects that apply to it have no effect on your phy sical body, nor do they persist when you return to it. The spell ends for you and your companions when you use your action to dismiss it. When the spell ends, the affected creature returns to its physical body, and it awakens. The spell might also end ea rly for you or one of your companions. A successful dispel magic spell used against an astral or physical body ends the spell for that creature. If a creature's original body or its astral form drops to 0 hit points, the spell ends for that creature. If the spell ends and the silver cord is intact, the cord pulls the creature's astral form back to its body, ending its state of suspended animation. If you are returned to your body prematurely, your companions remain in their astral forms and must find their own way back to their bodies, usually by dropping to 0 hit points.
en.components: V, S, M (for each creature you affect with this spell, you must provide one jacinth worth at least 1,000 gp and one ornately carved bar of silver worth at least 100 gp, all of which the spell consumes)

pt.name: Astral Projection
pt.description: You and up to eight willing creatur es within range project your astral bodies into the Astral Plane (the spell fails and the casting is wasted if you are already on that plane). The material body you leave behind is unconscious and in a state of suspended animation; it doesn't need food or air and doesn't age. Your astral body resembles your mortal form in almost every way, replicating your game statistics and possessions. The principal difference is the addition of a silvery cord that extends from between your shoulder blades and trails be hind you, fading to invisibility after 1 foot. This cord is your tether to your material body. As long as the tether remains intact, you can find your way home. If the cord is cut-something that can happen only when an effect specifically states that it do es-your soul and body are separated, killing you instantly. Your astral form can freely travel through the Astral Plane and can pass through portals there leading to any other plane. If you enter a new plane or return to the plane you were on when casting this spell, your body and possessions are transported along the silver cord, allowing you to re---enter your body as you enter the new plane. Your astral form is a separate incarnation. Any damage or other effects that apply to it have no effect on your phy sical body, nor do they persist when you return to it. The spell ends for you and your companions when you use your action to dismiss it. When the spell ends, the affected creature returns to its physical body, and it awakens. The spell might also end ea rly for you or one of your companions. A successful dispel magic spell used against an astral or physical body ends the spell for that creature. If a creature's original body or its astral form drops to 0 hit points, the spell ends for that creature. If the spell ends and the silver cord is intact, the cord pulls the creature's astral form back to its body, ending its state of suspended animation. If you are returned to your body prematurely, your companions remain in their astral forms and must find their own way back to their bodies, usually by dropping to 0 hit points.
pt.components: V, S, M (for each creature you affect with this spell, you must provide one jacinth worth at least 1,000 gp and one ornately carved bar of silver worth at least 100 gp, all of which the spell consumes)

en.name: Augury
en.description: By casting gem---inlaid sticks, rolling dragon bones, laying out ornate cards, or employing some other divining tool, you receive an omen from an otherworldly entity about the results of a specific course of action that you plan to take within the next 30 minutes. The GM chooses from the following possible omens: • Weal, for good results • Woe, for bad results • Weal and woe, for both good and bad results • Nothing, for results that aren't especially good or bad The spell doesn't take into account any possible circumstances that might change the outcome, such as the casting of additional spells or the loss or gain of a companion. If you cast the spell two or more times before completing your next long rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting af ter the first that you get a random reading. The GM makes this roll in secret.
en.components: V, S, M (specially marked sticks, bones, or similar tokens worth at least 25 gp)

en.name: Awaken
en.description: After spending the casting time tracing magical pathways within a precious gemstone, you touch a Huge or smaller beast or plant. The target must have either no Intelligence score or an Intelligence of 3 or less. The target gains an Intelligence of 10. The target also gains the ability to speak one language you know. If the target is a plant, it gains the ability to move its limbs, roots, vines, creepers, and so forth, and it gains senses similar to a human's. Your GM chooses statistics appropriate for the awakene d plant, such as the statistics for the awakened shrub or the awakened tree. The awakened beast or plant is charmed by you for 30 days or until you or your companions do anything harmful to it. When the charmed condition ends, the awakened creature choose s whether to remain friendly to you, based on how you treated it while it was charmed.
en.components: V, S, M (an agate worth at least 1,000 gp, which the spell consumes)

en.name: Banishment
en.description: You attempt to send one creature that you can see within range to another plane of existence. The target must succeed on a Charisma saving throw or be banished. If the target is native to the plane of existence you're on, you banish the target to a harmless demiplane. While there, the target is incapacitated. The target remains there until the spell ends, at which point the target reappears in the space it left or in the nearest unoccupied space if that space is occupied. If the target is native to a different plane of existence than the one you're on, the target is banished with a faint popping noise, returning to its home plane. If the spell ends before 1 minu te has passed, the target reappears in the space it left or in the nearest unoccupied space if that space is occupied. Otherwise, the target doesn't return.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 5th level or higher, you can targ et one additional creature for each slot level above 4th.

en.components: V, S, M (an item distasteful to the target)

en.name: Clone
en.description: This spell grows an inert duplicate of a living creature as a safeguard against death. This clone forms inside a sealed vessel and grows to full size and maturity after 120 days; you can also choose to have the clone be a younger version of the same creature. It remains inert and endures indefinitely, as long as its vessel remains undisturbed. At any time after the clone matures, if the original creature dies, its soul transfers to t he clone, provided that the soul is free and willing to return. The clone is physically identical to the original and has the same personality, memories, and abilities, but none of the original's equipment. The original creature's physical remains, if they still exist, become inert and can't thereafter be restored to life, since the creature's soul is elsewhere.
en.components: V, S, M (a diamond worth at least 1,000 gp and at least 1 cubic inch of flesh of the creature that is to be cloned, which the spell consumes, and a vessel worth at least 2,000 gp that has a sealable lid and is large enough to hold a Medium creature, such as a huge urn, coffin, mud--- filled cyst in the gro und, or crystal container filled with salt water)

en.name: Commune
en.description: You contact your deity or a divine proxy and ask up to three questions that can be answ ered with a yes or no. You must ask your questions before the spell ends. You receive a correct answer for each question. Divine beings aren't necessarily omniscient, so you might receive “unclear” as an answer if a question pertains to information that lies beyond the deity's knowledge. In a case where a one ---word answer could be misleading or contrary to the deity's interests, the GM might offer a short phrase as an answer instead. If you cast the spell two or more times before finishing your next long r est, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get no answer. The GM makes this roll in secret.
en.components: V, S, M (incense and a vial of holy or unholy water)

en.name: Commune with Nature
en.description: You briefly become one with nature and gain knowledge of the surrounding territory. In the outdoors, the spell gives you knowledge of the land within 3 miles of you. In caves and other natural underground settings, the radius is limited to 300 feet. The spell doesn't function where nature has been replaced by construction, such as in dungeons and towns. You instantly gain knowledge of up to three facts of your choice about any of the following subjects as they relate to the area: • terrain and bodies o f water • prevalent plants, minerals, animals, or peoples • powerful celestials, fey, fiends, elementals, or undead • influence from other planes of existence • buildings For example, you could determine the location of powerful undead in the area, the location of major sources of safe drinking water, and the location of any nearby towns.
en.components: V, S

en.name: Comprehend Languages

You also understand any written language that you see, but you must be touching the surface on which the words are written. It takes about 1 minute to read one page of text. This spell doesn't decode secret messages in a text or a glyph, such as an arcane sigil, that isn't part of a written language.
en.components: V, S, M (a pinch of soot and salt)

en.name: Compulsion
en.description: Creatures of your choice that you can see within range and that can hear you must make a Wisdom saving throw. A target automatically succeeds on this saving throw if it can't be charmed. On a failed save, a target is affected by this spell. Until the spell ends, you can use a bonus action on each of your turns to designate a direction that is horizontal to you. Each affected target must use as much of its movement as possible to move in that direction on its next turn. It can take its action before it moves. After moving in this way, it can make another Wisdom saving to try to end the effect. A target isn't compelled to move into an obviously deadly hazard, such as a fire or pit, but it will provoke opportunity attacks to move in the designated direction.
en.components: V, S

en.name: Create Undead
en.description: You create ghouls, ghasts, mummies, or wights from corpses.
en.components: V, S, M (one clay pot filled with grave dirt, one clay pot filled with brackish water, and one black onyx stone worth 150 gp for each corpse)

pt.name: Criar Mortos-Vivos
pt.description: Você cria carniçais, ghasts, múmias ou espectros corpóreos a partir de corpos.
pt.components: V, S, M (um pote de barro com terra de cemitério, um pote com água salobra e uma ônix negra de 150 po por corpo)

en.name: Create or Destroy Water
en.description: You create water in an open container or destroy water in a fog or container.
en.components: V, S, M (a drop of water if creating water or a few grains of sand if destroying it)

pt.name: Criar ou Destruir Água
pt.description: Você cria água em um recipiente aberto ou destrói água em névoa ou recipiente.
pt.components: V, S, M (uma gota d'água para criar ou alguns grãos de areia para destruir)

en.name: Creation
en.description: You pull wisps of shadow material from the Shadowfell to create a nonliving object.
en.components: V, S, M (a tiny piece of matter of the same type of the item you plan to create)

pt.name: Criação
pt.description: Você molda matéria sombria para criar um objeto não vivo.
pt.components: V, S, M (um pequeno pedaço de matéria do mesmo tipo do item que pretende criar)

en.name: Cure Wounds
en.description: A creature you touch regains hit points.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Curar Ferimentos
pt.description: Uma criatura tocada recupera pontos de vida.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Dancing Lights
en.description:
You create up to four torch-sized lights within range, making them appear as torches, lanterns, or glowing orbs that hover in the air for the duration. You can also combine the four lights into one glowing vaguely humanoid form of Medium size. Whichever form you choose, each light sheds dim light in a 10-foot radius.

As a bonus action on your turn, you can move the lights up to 60 feet to a new spot within range. A light must be within 20 feet of another light created by this spell, and a light winks out if it exceeds the spell's range.
en.components: V, S, M (a bit of phosphorus or wychwood, or a glowworm)

pt.name: Luzes Dançantes
pt.description:
Você cria até quatro luzes do tamanho de tochas dentro do alcance, fazendo-as parecer tochas, lanternas ou orbes brilhantes que flutuam no ar durante a duração. Você também pode combinar as quatro luzes em uma forma vagamente humanoides brilhante de tamanho Médio. Independentemente da forma escolhida, cada luz emite uma luz fraca em um raio de 3 metros.

Como uma ação bônus em seu turno, você pode mover as luzes até 18 metros para um novo local dentro do alcance. Uma luz deve estar a até 6 metros de outra luz criada por este feitiço, e uma luz se apaga se ultrapassar o alcance do feitiço.
pt.components: V, S, M (um pouco de fósforo ou madeira mágica, ou um vagalume)

en.name: Darkness
en.description: s Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose within range to fill a 15 ---foot---radius sphere for the duration. The darkness spreads around corners. A creature with darkvision can't see through this darkness, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it. If the point you choose is on an object you are holding or one that isn't being worn or carried, the darkness emanates from the object and moves with it. Completely covering the source of the darkness with an opaque object, such as a bowl or a helm, blocks the darkness. If any of this spell's area overlaps with an area of light created by a spell of 2nd level or lower, the spell that created the light is dispelled.
en.components: V, M (bat fur and a drop of pitch or piece of coal)

pt.name: Darkness
pt.description: s Magical darkness spreads from a point you choose within range to fill a 15 ---foot---radius sphere for the duration. The darkness spreads around corners. A creature with darkvision can't see through this darkness, and nonmagical light can't illuminate it. pt.components: V, M (bat fur and a drop of pitch or piece of coal)

en.name: Darkvision
en.description: You grant a creature the ability to see in darkness.
en.components: V, S, M (either a pinch of dried carrot or an agate)

pt.name: Visão no Escuro
pt.description: Você concede a uma criatura a capacidade de ver na escuridão.
pt.components: V, S, M (uma pitada de cenoura seca ou uma ágata)

en.name: Daylight
en.description: A 60-foot-radius sphere of bright light spreads from a point you choose.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Luz do Dia
pt.description: Uma esfera de luz intensa de 18 metros irradia de um ponto escolhido.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Death Ward
en.description: The first time the target would drop to 0 hit points, it drops to 1 instead.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Proteção Contra a Morte
pt.description: Na primeira vez que o alvo cairia a 0 pontos de vida, ele cai para 1 em vez disso.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Delayed Blast Fireball
en.description: A bead of fire grows more intense before exploding in a fiery blast.
en.components: V, S, M (a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur)

pt.name: Bola de Fogo Retardada
pt.description: Uma esfera de fogo cresce em intensidade antes de explodir em uma rajada flamejante.
pt.components: V, S, M (uma pequena bola de guano de morcego e enxofre)

en.name: Demiplane
en.description: You create a shadowy door leading to a small extradimensional room.
en.components: S

pt.name: Semiplano
pt.description: Você cria uma porta sombria que leva a uma pequena sala extradimensional.
pt.components: S

en.name: Detect Evil and Good
en.description: You sense aberrations, celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead nearby.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Detectar o Bem e o Mal
pt.description: Você detecta aberrações, celestiais, elementais, feéricos, ínferos e mortos-vivos próximos.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Detect Magic
en.description: You sense the presence of magic within 30 feet.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Detectar Magia
pt.description: Você sente a presença de magia em até 9 metros.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Detect Poison and Disease
en.description: You sense poisons, poisonous creatures, and diseases nearby.
en.components: V, S, M (a yew leaf)

pt.name: Detectar Venenos e Doenças
pt.description: Você sente venenos, criaturas venenosas e doenças próximas.
pt.components: V, S, M (uma folha de teixo)

en.name: Detect Thoughts
en.description: You read the surface thoughts of creatures and probe deeper with effort.
en.components: V, S, M (a copper piece)

pt.name: Detectar Pensamentos
pt.description: Você lê pensamentos superficiais e pode sondar mais profundamente com esforço.
pt.components: V, S, M (uma peça de cobre)

en.name: Dimension Door
en.description: You teleport yourself and one willing creature to a destination within range.
en.components: V

pt.name: Porta Dimensional
pt.description: Você se teleporta, junto de uma criatura voluntária, para um destino dentro do alcance.
pt.components: V

en.name: Disguise Self
en.description: You make yourself look different until the spell ends.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Disfarçar-se
pt.description: Você altera sua aparência até a magia terminar.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Disintegrate
en.description: A thin green ray deals massive force damage and can reduce a target to dust.
en.components: V, S, M (a lodestone and a pinch of dust)

pt.name: Desintegrar
pt.description: Um raio verde causa enorme dano de força e pode reduzir o alvo a pó.
pt.components: V, S, M (uma magnetita e uma pitada de pó)

en.name: Dispel Evil and Good
en.description: Celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead have disadvantage attacking the target, and you can dismiss or banish such creatures.
en.components: V, S, M (holy water or powdered silver and iron)

pt.name: Dissipar o Bem e o Mal
pt.description: Celestiais, elementais, feéricos, ínferos e mortos-vivos têm desvantagem ao atacar o alvo, e você pode expulsá-los ou bani-los.
pt.components: V, S, M (água benta ou prata e ferro em pó)

en.name: Dispel Magic
en.description: Choose one creature, object, or magical effect to end spells affecting it.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Dissipar Magia
pt.description: Escolha uma criatura, objeto ou efeito mágico para encerrar as magias que o afetam.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Divination
en.description: Your magic and an offering put you in contact with a god or a god's servants. You ask a single quest ion concerning a specific goal, event, or activity to occur within 7 days. The GM offers a truthful reply. The reply might be a short phrase, a cryptic rhyme, or an omen. The spell doesn't take into account any possible circumstances that might change the outcome, such as the casting of additional spells or the loss or gain of a companion. If you cast the spell two or more times before finishing your next long rest, there is a cumulative 25 percent chance for each casting after the first that you get a random reading. The GM makes this roll in secret.
en.components: V, S, M (incense and a sacrificial offering appropriate to your religion, together worth at least 25 gp, which the spell consumes)

pt.name: Divination

The GM offers a truthful reply. The reply might be a short phrase, a cryptic rhyme, or an omen. The GM makes this roll in secret.
pt.components: V, S, M (incense and a sacrificial offering appropriate to your religion, together worth at least 25 gp, which the spell consumes)

en.name: Divine Favor
en.description: Your prayer empowers you with divine radiance. Until the spell ends, your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 radiant damage on a hit.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Divine Favor
pt.description: Your prayer empowers you with divine radiance. Until the spell ends, your weapon attacks deal an extra 1d4 radiant damage on a hit.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Divine Word
en.description: You utter a divine word that affects creatures by their remaining hit points.
en.components: V

pt.name: Palavra Divina
pt.description: Você pronuncia uma palavra divina que afeta criaturas conforme seus pontos de vida restantes.
pt.components: V

en.name: Dominate Beast
en.description: You take control of a beast's actions.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Dominar Besta
pt.description: Você assume controle das ações de uma besta.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Dominate Monster
en.description: You beguile a creature into obeying your commands.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Dominar Monstro
pt.description: Você subjuga uma criatura para obedecer seus comandos.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Dominate Person
en.description: You attempt to beguile a humanoid into obeying your commands.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Dominar Pessoa
pt.description: Você tenta subjugar um humanoide para obedecer seus comandos.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Dream
en.description: You shape a messenger's dreams to deliver a message or nightmare.
en.components: V, S, M (a handful of sand, a dab of ink, and a writing quill plucked from a sleeping bird)

pt.name: Sonho
pt.description: Você molda os sonhos de um mensageiro para transmitir uma mensagem ou pesadelo.
pt.components: V, S, M (um punhado de areia, tinta e uma pena arrancada de uma ave adormecida)

en.name: Druidcraft
en.description: Whispering to the spirits of nature, you create minor natural effects.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Druidismo
pt.description: Sussurrando aos espíritos da natureza, você cria pequenos efeitos naturais.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Earthquake
en.description: A violent tremor shakes the ground and structures in the area.
en.components: V, S, M (a pinch of dirt, a piece of rock, and a lump of clay)

pt.name: Terremoto
pt.description: Um tremor violento abala o solo e estruturas na área.
pt.components: V, S, M (uma pitada de terra, uma pedra e um pedaço de argila)

en.name: Eldritch Blast
en.description: A beam of crackling energy streaks toward a creature within range.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Rajada Mística
pt.description: Um feixe de energia crepitante dispara contra uma criatura dentro do alcance.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Enhance Ability
en.description: You bestow a magical enhancement on a creature's abilities.
en.components: V, S, M (fur or a feather from a beast)

pt.name: Aprimorar Habilidade
pt.description: Você concede um aprimoramento mágico às habilidades de uma criatura.
pt.components: V, S, M (pelo ou pena de uma besta)

en.name: Enlarge/Reduce
en.description: You cause a creature or object to grow larger or smaller.
en.components: V, S, M (a pinch of powdered iron)

pt.name: Aumentar/Reduzir
pt.description: Você faz uma criatura ou objeto crescer ou diminuir.
pt.components: V, S, M (uma pitada de ferro em pó)

en.name: Entangle
en.description: Grasping weeds and vines sprout from the ground to restrain creatures.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Enredar
pt.description: Ervas e vinhas agarram criaturas e tentam imobilizá-las.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Enthrall
en.description: You weave distracting words, making creatures pay less attention to others.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Cativar
pt.description: Você tece palavras hipnóticas, fazendo criaturas prestarem menos atenção aos outros.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Etherealness
en.description: You step into the border regions of the Ethereal Plane.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Etereidade
pt.description: Você entra nas regiões limítrofes do Plano Etéreo.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Expeditious Retreat
en.description: This spell allows you to move at an incredible pace.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Recuo Acelerado
pt.description: Esta magia permite que você se mova em um ritmo incrível.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Eyebite
en.description: Your eyes become an inky void and can sicken, panic, or put creatures to sleep.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Mordida Ocular
pt.description: Seus olhos se tornam um vazio sombrio e podem enjoar, apavorar ou adormecer criaturas.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Fabricate
en.description: You convert raw materials into products of the same material.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Fabricar
pt.description: Você converte matéria-prima em produtos do mesmo material.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Faerie Fire
en.description: Objects and creatures in a cube are outlined in light, preventing invisibility and granting attack advantage.
en.components: V

pt.name: Fogo das Fadas
pt.description: Objetos e criaturas em um cubo ficam contornados por luz, anulando invisibilidade e ajudando ataques.
pt.components: V

en.name: Faithful Hound
en.description: s You conjure a phantom watchdog in an unoccupied space that you can see within range, where it remains for the duration, until you dismiss it as an action, or until you move more than 100 feet away from it. The hound is invisible to all creatures except you and can't be harmed. When a Small or larger creature comes within 30 feet of it without first speaking the password that you specify when you cast this spell, the hound starts bark ing loudly. The hound sees invisible creatures and can see into the Ethereal Plane. It ignores illusions. At the start of each of your turns, the hound attempts to bite one creature within 5 feet of it that is hostile to you. The hound's attack bonus is e qual to your spellcasting ability modifier + your proficiency bonus. On a hit, it deals 4d8 piercing damage.
en.components: V, S, M (a tiny silver whistle, a piece of bone, and a thread)

pt.name: Faithful Hound
pt.description: s You conjure a phantom watchdog in an unoccupied space that you can see within range, where it remains for the duration, until you dismiss it as an action, or until you move more than 100 feet away from it. The hound's attack bonus is e qual to your spellcasting ability modifier + your proficiency bonus. On a hit, it deals 4d8 piercing damage.
pt.components: V, S, M (a tiny silver whistle, a piece of bone, and a thread)

en.name: False Life
en.description: Bolstering yourself with a necromantic facsimile of life, you gain 1d4 + 4 temporary hit points for the duration.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you gain 5 additional temporary hit points for each slot level above 1st.

en.components: V, S, M (a small amount of alcohol or distilled spirits)

pt.name: False Life
pt.description: Bolstering yourself with a necromantic facsimile of life, you gain 1d4 + 4 temporary hit points for the duration.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, you gain 5 additional temporary hit points for each slot level above 1st.

pt.components: V, S, M (a small amount of alcohol or distilled spirits)

en.name: Fear
en.description: You project a phantasmal image of a creature's worst fears. Each creature in a 30--- foot cone must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or drop whatever it is holding and become frightened for the duration. While frightened by this spell, a creature must take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest available route on each of its turns, unless there is nowhere to move. If the creature ends its turn in a location where it doesn't have line of sight to you, the creature can make a Wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the spell ends for that creature.
en.components: V, S, M (a white feather or the heart of a hen)

pt.name: Fear
pt.description: You project a phantasmal image of a creature's worst fears. Each creature in a 30--- foot cone must succeed on a Wisdom saving throw or drop whatever it is holding and become frightened for the duration. While frightened by this spell, a creature must take the Dash action and move away from you by the safest available route on each of its turns, unless there is nowhere to move. If the creature ends its turn in a location where it doesn't have line of sight to you, the creature can make a Wisdom saving throw. On a successful save, the spell ends for that creature.
pt.components: V, S, M (a white feather or the heart of a hen)

en.name: Feather Fall
en.description: Choose up to five falling creatures with in range. A falling creature's rate of descent slows to 60 feet per round until the spell ends. If the creature lands before the spell ends, it takes no falling damage and can land on its feet, and the spell ends for that creature.
en.castingTime: 1 reaction, which you take when you or a creature within 60 feet of you falls
en.components: V, M (a small feather or piece of down)

pt.name: Feather Fall
pt.description: Choose up to five falling creatures with in range. A falling creature's rate of descent slows to 60 feet per round until the spell ends. If the creature lands before the spell ends, it takes no falling damage and can land on its feet, and the spell ends for that creature.
pt.castingTime: 1 reação, which you take when you or a creature within 60 metros of you falls
pt.components: V, M (a small feather or piece of down)

en.name: Feeblemind
en.description: You blast the mind of a creature that you can see within range, attempting to shatter its intellect and personality. The target takes 4d6 psychic damage and must make an Intelligence saving throw. On a failed save, the creature's Intelligence and Charisma scores become 1. The creature can't cast spells, activate magic items, understand language, or communicate in any intelligible way. The creature can, however, identify its friends, follow them, and even protect them. At the end of every 30 days, the creature can repeat its saving throw against this spell. If it succeeds on its saving throw, the spell ends. The spell can also be ended by greater restoration , heal, or wish.
en.components: V, S, M (a handful of clay, crystal, glass, or mineral spheres)

pt.name: Feeblemind
pt.description: You blast the mind of a creature that you can see within range, attempting to shatter its intellect and personality. The target takes 4d6 psychic damage and must make an Intelligence saving throw. On a failed save, the creature's Intelligence and Charisma scores become 1. The creature can't cast spells, activate magic items, understand language, or communicate in any intelligible way. The creature can, however, identify its friends, follow them, and even protect them. At the end of every 30 days, the creature can repeat its saving throw against this spell. If it succeeds on its saving throw, the spell ends. The spell can also be ended by greater restoration , heal, or wish.
pt.components: V, S, M (a handful of clay, crystal, glass, or mineral spheres)

en.name: Find Familiar
en.description: You gain the service of a familiar, a spirit that takes an animal form you choose: bat, cat, crab, frog (toad), hawk, lizard, octopus, owl, poisonous snake, fish (quipper), rat, raven, sea horse, spider, or weasel. Appearing in an unoccupied space within range, the familiar has the statistics of the chosen form, though it is a celestial, fey, or fiend (your choice) instead of a beast. Your familiar acts independently of you, but it always obeys your commands. In combat, it rolls its own initiative and acts on its own turn. A familiar can't attack, but it can take other actions as normal. When the familiar drops to 0 hit points, it disappears, leaving behind no physical form. It reappears after you cast this spell again While your familiar is within 100 feet of you, you can communicate with it telepathically. Additionally, as an action, you can see through your familiar's eyes and hear what it hears until the start of your next turn, gaining the benefits of any special sense s that the familiar has. During this time, you are deaf and blind with regard to your own senses. As an action, you can temporarily dismiss your familiar. It disappears into a pocket dimension where it awaits your summons. Alternatively, you can dismiss it forever. As an action while it is temporarily dismissed, you can cause it to reappear in any unoccupied space within 30 feet of you. You can't have more than one familiar at a time. If you cast this spell while you already have a familiar, you instead cause it to adopt a new form. Choose one of the forms from the above list. Your familiar transforms into the chosen creature. Finally, when you cast a spell with a range of touch, your familiar can deliver the spell as if it had cast the spell. Your familiar must be within 100 feet of you, and it must use its reaction to deliver the spell when you cast it. If the spell requires an attack roll, you use your attack modifier for the roll.
en.components: V, S, M (10 gp worth of charcoal, incense, and herbs that must be consumed by fire in a brass brazier)

pt.components: V, S, M (10 gp worth of charcoal, incense, and herbs that must be consumed by fire in a brass brazier)

en.name: Find Steed
en.description: You summon a spirit that assumes the form of an unusually intelligent, strong, and loyal steed, creating a long---lasting bond with it. Appearing in an unoccupied space within range, the steed takes on a form that you choose: a warhorse, a pony, a camel, an elk, or a mastiff. (Your GM might allow other animals to be summoned as steeds.) The steed has the statistics of the chosen form, though it is a celestial, fey, or fiend (your choice) instead of its normal type. Additionally, if your steed has an Intelligence of 5 or less, its Intelligence becomes 6, and it gains the ability to understand one language of your choice that you speak. Your steed serves you as a mount, both in combat and out, and you have an instinctiv e bond with it that allows you to fight as a seamless unit. While mounted on your steed, you can make any spell you cast that targets only you also target your steed. When the steed drops to 0 hit points, it disappears, leaving behind no physical form. Yo u can also dismiss your steed at any time as an action, causing it to disappear. In either case, casting this spell again summons the same steed, restored to its hit point maximum. While your steed is within 1 mile of you, you can communicate with it tele pathically. You can't have more than one steed bonded by this spell at a time. As an action, you can release the steed from its bond at any time, causing it to disappear.
en.components: V, S

Your steed serves you as a mount, both in combat and out, and you have an instinctiv e bond with it that allows you to fight as a seamless unit. While mounted on your steed, you can make any spell you cast that targets only you also target your steed. When the steed drops to 0 hit points, it disappears, leaving behind no physical form. Yo u can also dismiss your steed at any time as an action, causing it to disappear. In either case, casting this spell again summons the same steed, restored to its hit point maximum. While your steed is within 1 mile of you, you can communicate with it tele pathically. You can't have more than one steed bonded by this spell at a time. As an action, you can release the steed from its bond at any time, causing it to disappear.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Find Traps
en.description: You sense the presence of any trap within range that is within line of sight. A trap, for the purpose of this spell, includes anything that would inflict a sudden or unexpected effect you consider harmful or undesirable, which was specific ally intended as such by its creator. Thus, the spell would sense an area affected by the alarm spell, a glyph of warding, or a mechanical pit trap, but it would not reveal a natural weakness in the floor, an unstable ceiling, or a hidden sinkhole. This spell merely reveals that a trap is present. You don't learn the location of each trap, but you do learn the general nature of the danger posed by a trap you sense.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Find Traps
pt.description: You sense the presence of any trap within range that is within line of sight. This spell merely reveals that a trap is present. You don't learn the location of each trap, but you do learn the general nature of the danger posed by a trap you sense.
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Find the Path
en.description: This spell allows you to find the shortest, most direct physical route to a specific fixed location that you are familiar with on the same plane of existence. If you name a destination on another plane of existence, a destination that moves (such as a mobile fortress), or a destination that isn't specific (such as “a green dragon's lair”), the spell fails. For the duration, as long as you are on the same plane of existence as the destination, you know how far it is and in what direction it lies. While you are traveling there, whenever you are presented with a choice of paths along the way, you automatically determine which path is the shortest and most direct route (but not necessarily the safest route) to the destination.
en.components: V, S, M (a set of divinatory tools - such as bones, ivory sticks, cards, teeth, or carved runes-worth 100 gp and an object from the location you wish to find)

en.name: Finger of Death
en.description: You send negative energy coursing through a creature that you can see within range, causing it searing pain. The target must make a Constitution saving throw. It takes 7d8 + 30 necrotic damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. A humanoid killed by this spell rises at the start of your next turn as a zombie that is permanently under your command, following your verbal orders to the best of its ability.
en.components: V, S

en.name: Fire Bolt
en.description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage. A flammable object hit by this spell ignites if it isn't being worn or carried. This spell's damage increases by 1d10 when you reach 5th level (2d10), 11th level (3d10), and 17th level (4d10).
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Fire Bolt
pt.description: You hurl a mote of fire at a creature or object within range. Make a ranged spell attack against the target. On a hit, the target takes 1d10 fire damage. A flammable object hit by this spell ignites if it isn't being worn or carried. This spell's damage increases by 1d10 when you reach 5th level (2d10), 11th level (3d10), and 17th level (4d10).
pt.components: V, S

en.name: Fire Shield
en.description: s Thin and wispy flames wreathe your body for the duration, shedding bright light in a 10 ---foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. You can end the spell early by using an action to dismiss it. The flames provide you with a warm shield or a chill shield, as you choose. The warm shield grants you resistance to cold damage, and the chill shield grants you resistance to fire damage. In addition, whenever a creature within 5 feet of you hits you with a melee attack, the shield erupts with flame. The attacker takes 2d8 fire damage from a warm shield, or 2d8 cold damage from a cold shield.
en.components: V, S, M (a bit of phosphorus or a firefly)

pt.name: Fire Shield
pt.description: s Thin and wispy flames wreathe your body for the duration, shedding bright light in a 10 ---foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet. en.name: Fire Storm
en.description: A storm made up of sheets of roaring f lame appears in a location you choose within range. The area of the storm consists of up to ten 10 ---foot cubes, which you can arrange as you wish. Each cube must have at least one face adjacent to the face of another cube. Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw. It takes 7d10 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The fire damages objects in the area and ignites flammable objects that aren't being worn or carried. If you choose, plant life in the area is unaffected by this spell.
en.components: V, S

pt.name: Fire Storm

Each creature in the area must make a Dexterity saving throw. It takes 7d10 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. pt.components: V, S

en.name: Fireball
en.description: A bright streak flashes from your pointing finger to a point you choose within range and then blossoms with a low roar into an explosion of flame. Each creature in a 20---foot---radius sphere centered on that point must make a Dexterity saving throw. A target takes 8d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. The fire spreads around corners. It ignites flammable objects in the area that aren't being worn or carried.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 3rd.

en.components: V, S, M (a tiny ball of bat guano and sulfur)

en.name: Flame Blade
en.description: s You evoke a fiery blade in your free hand. The blade is similar in size and shape to a scimitar, and it lasts for the duration. If you let go of the blade, it disappears, but you can evoke the blade again as a bonus action. You can use your action to make a melee spell attack with the fiery blade. On a hit, the target takes 3d6 fire damage. The flaming blade sheds bright light in a 10 ---foot radius and dim light for an additional 10 feet.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for every two slot levels abo ve 2nd.

en.components: V, S, M (leaf of sumac)

en.name: Flame Strike
en.description: A vertical column of divine fire roars down from the heavens in a location you specify. Each creature in a 10---foot---radius, 40---foot---high cylinder centered on a point within range must make a Dexterity saving throw. A creature takes 4d6 fire damage and 4d6 radiant damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 6th level or higher, the fire damage or the radiant damage (your choice) increases by 1d6 for each slot level above 5th.

en.components: V, S, M (pinch of sulfur)

en.name: Flaming Sphere
en.description: A 5---foot---diameter sphere of fire appears in an unoccupied space of your choice within range and lasts for the duration. Any creature that ends its tu rn within 5 feet of the sphere must make a Dexterity saving throw. The creature takes 2d6 fire damage on a failed save, or half as much damage on a successful one. As a bonus action, you can move the sphere up to 30 feet. If you ram the sphere into a crea ture, that creature must make the saving throw against the sphere's damage, and the sphere stops moving this turn. When you move the sphere, you can direct it over barriers up to 5 feet tall and jump it across pits up to 10 feet wide. The sphere ignites f lammable objects not being worn or carried, and it sheds bright light in a 20---foot radius and dim light for an additional 20 feet.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 3rd level or higher, the damage increases by 1d6 for each s lot level above 2nd.

en.components: V, S, M (a bit of tallow, a pinch of brimstone, and a dusting of powdered iron)

en.name: Flesh to Stone
en.description: You attempt to turn one creature that you can see within range into stone. If the target's body is made of flesh, the creature must make a Constitution saving throw. On a failed save, it is restrained as its flesh begins to harden. On a successful save, the creature isn't affected. A creature restrained by this spel l must make another Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If it successfully saves against this spell three times, the spell ends. If it fails its saves three times, it is turned to stone and subjected to the petrified condition for th e duration. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both until the target collects three of a kind. If the creature is physically broken while petrified, it suffers from similar deformities if it reverts to its original state. If you maintain your concentration on this spell for the entire possible duration, the creature is turned to stone until the effect is removed.
en.components: V, S, M (a pinch of lime, water, and earth)

pt.description: You attempt to turn one creature that you can see within range into stone. If the target's body is made of flesh, the creature must make a Constitution saving throw. A creature restrained by this spel l must make another Constitution saving throw at the end of each of its turns. If it successfully saves against this spell three times, the spell ends. If it fails its saves three times, it is turned to stone and subjected to the petrified condition for th e duration. The successes and failures don't need to be consecutive; keep track of both until the target collects three of a kind. en.name: Floating Disk
en.description: This spell creates a circular, horizontal plane of force, 3 feet in diameter and 1 inch thick, that floats 3 feet above the ground in an unoccupied space of your choice that you can see within range. The disk remains for the duration, and can hold up to 500 pounds. If more weight is placed on it, the spell ends, and everything on the disk falls to the ground. The disk is immobile while you are within 20 feet of it. If you move more than 20 feet away from it, th e disk follows you so that it remains within 20 feet of you. It can move across uneven terrain, up or down stairs, slopes and the like, but it can't cross an elevation change of 10 feet or more. For example, the disk can't move across a 10 ---foot---deep pit, nor could it leave such a pit if it was created at the bottom. If you move more than 100 feet from the disk (typically because it can't move around an obstacle to follow you), the spell ends.
en.components: V, S, M (a drop of mercury)

en.name: Fly
en.description: s You touch a willing creature. The target gains a flying speed of 60 feet for the duration. When the spell ends, the target falls if it is still aloft, unless it can stop the fall.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 4th level or higher, you can target one additional creature for each slot level above 3rd.

en.components: V, S, M (a wing feather from any bird)

en.name: Fog Cloud
en.description: You create a 20---foot---radius sphere of fog centered on a point within range. The sphere spreads around corners, and its area is heavily obscured. It lasts for the duration or until a wind of moderate or greater speed (at least 10 miles per hour) disperses it.

higherLevels.level: When you cast this spell using a spell slot of 2nd level or higher, the radius of the fog increases by 20 feet for each slot level above 1st.

en.components: V, S

pt.name: Fog Cloud

en.name: Forbiddance
en.description: You create a ward against magical travel that protects up to 40,000 square feet of floor space to a height of 30 feet above the floor. For the duration, creatures can't teleport into the area or use portals, such as those created by the gate spell, to enter the area. The spell proofs the area against planar travel, and therefore prevents creatures from accessing the area by way of the Astral Plane, Ethereal Plane, Feywild, Shadowfell, or the plane shift spell. In addition, the spell damages types of creatu res that you choose when you cast it. Choose one or more of the following: celestials, elementals, fey, fiends, and undead. When a chosen creature enters the spell's area for the first time on a turn or starts its turn there, the creature takes 5d10 radian t or necrotic damage (your choice when you cast this spell). When you cast this spell, you can designate a password. A creature that speaks the password as it enters the area takes no damage from the spell. The spell's area can't overlap with the area of another forbiddance spell. If you cast forbiddance every day for 30 days in the same location, the spell lasts until it is dispelled, and the material components are consumed on the last casting.
en.components: V, S, M (a sprinkling of holy water, rare incense, and powdered ruby worth at least 1,000 gp)

en.name: Forcecage
en.description: An immobile, invisible, cube ---shaped prison composed of magical force springs into existence around an area you choose within range. The prison can be a cage or a solid box, as you choose. A prison in the shape of a cage can be up to 20 feet on a side and is made from 1/2 ---inch diameter bars spaced 1/2 inch apart. A prison in the shape of a box can be up to 10 feet on a side, creating a solid barrier that prevents any matter from passing through it and blocking any spells cast into or out from the area. When you cast the spell, any creature that is completely inside the cage's area is trapped. Creatures only partially within the area, or those too large to fit inside the area, are pus hed away from the center of the area until they are completely outside the area. A creature inside the cage can't leave it by nonmagical means. If the creature tries to use teleportation or interplanar travel to leave the cage, it must first make a Charis ma saving throw. On a success, the creature can use that magic to exit the cage. On a failure, the creature can't exit the cage and wastes the use of the spell or effect. The cage also extends into the Ethereal Plane, blocking ethereal travel. This spell can't be dispelled by dispel magic.
en.components: V, S, M (ruby dust worth 1,500 gp)
